description_long: This object is a traffic light assembly mounted on a horizontal bar supported by a single vertical cylindrical pole. The bar holds three individual traffic signal units, each encased in a yellow housing with visible red, yellow, and green lenses. The signals are arranged in a row, facing outward, and are separated by equal distances along the bar. The pole and bar are metallic and painted a light gray, while the signal housings are a bright yellow with black backing. The lenses are circular and colored, with the classic traffic light arrangement. The overall structure is robust and designed for outdoor urban environments, likely positioned at intersections to control vehicle flow.
description: A pole-mounted traffic light with three yellow signal units on a horizontal gray bar, each displaying red, yellow, and green lenses. The structure is sturdy and designed for urban intersections.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the horizontal gray bar, three yellow signal housings, and the supporting vertical pole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the pole and the slim profile of the signal housings.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying all three traffic signal faces with visible red, yellow, and green lenses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the signal housings and the supporting bar.
